title: HIVE Task Graph
description: Schema for the task graph — a decomposition of the run goal into individual agent tasks

run_id.description: Unique run identifier matching the run contract

tasks.description: The tasks that make up this run

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task graph was created

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this task within the run

assigned_role.description: The hive role assigned to execute this task

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task can begin

objective.description: The specific objective for this task

allowed_paths.description: File paths the agent is permitted to access

forbidden_paths.description: File paths the agent must not access

completion_conditions.description: Conditions that define when this task is complete

approval_requirements.description: Approval gates specific to this task

status.description: Current handoff status of this task
